meta.title: DEF CON 31 XRVillage  - Fireside Chat - Brittan Heller
meta.description: Explore emerging technology, hardware and experiences in the XR Village Playground. Meet and learn from technologists, futurists, and artists in the XR (VR / AR) space. Sponsored by BadVR and in collaboration with ICS Village, Red Team Village, Adversary Village and Policy Village.
